content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility 26.1% with full breadth (8/8 sectors positive), market participation broad and risk appetite elevated.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom and Construction & REIT are leaders: KONTR (1W: +31.39% | 1M: +12.43%) ABOVE TREND and TKFEN (1W: +20.41% | 1M: +38.69%) ABOVE TREND, with strong follow-through into banks (AKBNK (1W: +10.10% | 1M: +5.45%) ABOVE TREND).

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Transportation and Energy & Chemicals lag the rally: PGSUS (1W: +2.97% | 1M: +2.63%) ABOVE TREND but muted, and TRALT (1W: -0.86% | 1M: -19.56%) BELOW TREND showing clear weakness within energy.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +31.39% | 1M: +12.43%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +23.22% | 1M: +25.83%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +20.41% | 1M: +38.69%) ABOVE TREND; CCOLA (1W: +11.99% | 1M: +5.13%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +10.10% | 1M: +5.45%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
VESTL (1W: -3.73% | 1M: -3.40%) BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -0.86% | 1M: -19.56%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: +0.42% | 1M: -8.44%) RECOVERY; ULKER (1W: +1.19% | 1M: +7.87%) ABOVE TREND; TAVHL (1W: +1.62% | 1M: +10.51%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Big short-term movers: KONTR (1W: +31.39% | 1M: +12.43%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +23.22% | 1M: +25.83%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +20.41% | 1M: +38.69%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +10.10% | 1M: +5.45%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +9.68% | 1M: +6.01%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking strong and leadership-confirming: AKBNK (1W: +10.10% | 1M: +5.45%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +9.68% | 1M: +6.01%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +8.31% | 1M: +6.13%) ABOVE TREND — favor overweight exposure to large-cap banks.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry shows broad strength but dispersion: ASELS (1W: +23.22% | 1M: +25.83%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: +6.45% | 1M: +11.65%) ABOVE TREND lead, while VESTL (1W: -3.73% | 1M: -3.40%) BELOW TREND is a notable laggard.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy mixed with rotation into select names: TRMET (1W: +8.42% | 1M: -11.58%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +2.92% | 1M: +3.81%) ABOVE TREND, but TRALT (1W: -0.86% | 1M: -19.56%) BELOW TREND keeps downside risk in parts of the complex.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight banks, technology/telecom and construction/REITs; trim structurally weak names (TRALT, VESTL) and allocate to high-momentum cyclicals while keeping stops tight on recent big winners.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +31.39% | 1M: +12.43%) ABOVE TREND for follow-through or fade, ASELS (1W: +23.22% | 1M: +25.83%) ABOVE TREND for defense order flow, TKFEN (1W: +20.41% | 1M: +38.69%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/contract catalysts.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Technology & Telecom for momentum continuation, Construction & REIT for earnings/contract flow, and Banking for macro sensitivity to rates and liquidity.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 for continuation above recent weekly highs and hold of the 1-week moving average as support; catalysts include Q1 results, CBRT commentary on liquidity, global risk sentiment and oil/commodity moves.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with normal volatility and uniform sector participation; leadership from tech, construction and banks. Tactical overweight to high-momentum cyclicals while managing risk around lagging names (TRALT, VESTL) and upcoming Q1 catalysts.
